12:
n = int(input())
trophies = list(input())

# Initialize variables
max_length = 0
current_length = 0

# Loop through the trophies
for i in range(n):
    if trophies[i] == 'G':
        current_length += 1
    else:
        max_length = max(max_length, current_length)
        current_length = 0

# Check the last subsegment
max_length = max(max_length, current_length)

# Print the result
print(max_length)
